ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "asian_pi" REAL /* Percentage of Asian-Pacific Islander population */,
  "black" REAL /* Percentage of Black population */,
  "hispanic_lt" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic-Latino population */,
  "native_am" REAL /* Percentage of Native American population */,
  "other" REAL /* Percentage of Other population */,
  "white" REAL /* Percentage of White population */,
  "unknown" REAL /* Percentage of Unknown population */,
  "total" REAL /* Total percentage of the population */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size used for the demographic data */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the demographic data */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the demographic data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 18-24) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start age of the age group */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity (e.g., Asian-Pacific Islander) */,
  "ethnicity_description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_code" TEXT /* Code for the ethnicity (e.g., API, Black) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the health outcome (e.g., Diabetes, Hypertension) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the health outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of the health outcome (e.g., disease, condition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "health_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health outcome */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health data (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the health data */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the health data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES health_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Hospital A, Public Health Record) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., hospital, clinic, public health record) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector who collected the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collector */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collector (e.g., data analyst, researcher) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the collector (e.g., hospital, university) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report (e.g., Annual Health Report 2023) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry included in the report */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., demographic, health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "viz_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization (e.g., Age Group Distribution 2023) */,
  "viz_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "viz_format" TEXT /* Format of the visualization (e.g., PNG, SVG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viz_data" (
  "viz_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization data entry */,
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry included in the visualization */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., demographic, health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viz_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viz_data_viz_id FOREIGN KEY ("viz_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("viz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
